originalTitle: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
title: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
content: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation.

originalTitle: US warns citizens to reconsider Nigeria travel on safety grounds
title: US warns citizens to reconsider Nigeria travel on safety grounds
content: The state department has also authorised non-emergency embassy staff to leave on security grounds.

originalTitle: Kenya disputes UN report on rape allegations against its Haiti personnel
title: Kenya disputes UN report on rape allegations against its Haiti personnel
content: The foreign minister says the accusations, involving children, were investigated and found to be unsubstantiated.

originalTitle: US fertility rate drops to all-time low, continuing a two-decade decline
title: US fertility rate drops to all-time low, continuing a two-decade decline
content: The United States fertility rate has now been in decline for two decades, dropping nearly 23 percent since 2007.

originalTitle: Why is Hezbollah a sticking point in the Iran ceasefire?
title: Why is Hezbollah a sticking point in the Iran ceasefire?
content: Lebanese armed group is an ally of Tehran but still under attack from Israel.

originalTitle: US led ‘historic’ foreign aid decline in 2025 amid Trump cuts: OECD
title: US led ‘historic’ foreign aid decline in 2025 amid Trump cuts: OECD
content: A forum of top economies in Europe and Americas says aid from members declined 23 percent as humanitarian needs grow.

originalTitle: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
title: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
content: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.

originalTitle: Trump criticises Nato as alliance chief describes meeting as 'very frank'
title: Trump criticises Nato as alliance chief describes meeting as 'very frank'
content: The US president says Nato "wasn't there when we needed them" during the Iran war.

originalTitle: Al Jazeera condemns killing of journalist in Israeli strike in Gaza
title: Al Jazeera condemns killing of journalist in Israeli strike in Gaza
content: The Israeli military claims Mohammed Wishah was a "Hamas terrorist" - which the Qatar-based network has previously denied.

originalTitle: Robertson to leave Liverpool at the end of the season
title: Robertson to leave Liverpool at the end of the season
content: Andy Robertson will leave Liverpool at the end of the season when his contract expires in the summer, the club has announced.

originalTitle: Arsenal's big summer - Arteta contract, £100m for Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly
title: Arsenal's big summer - Arteta contract, £100m for Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly
content: Whatever happens this season, Arsenal are facing some big decisions in the summer over Mikel Arteta's contract and their transfer moves.

originalTitle: Seven games to go - how will De Zerbi try to save Spurs?
title: Seven games to go - how will De Zerbi try to save Spurs?
content: Clubs at risk of relegation tend to hire pragmatic coaches - but Spurs have not done that by appointing Roberto de Zerbi.
